text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My race against King in the Mile<n>Championship is
over. I feel her<n>determination wash over me, and
my<n>love for Umamusume goes through<n>the roof!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
King tells me to run against lots of<n>Umamusume
and become a true<n>all-rounder! Oh, what golden
words of<n>wisdom!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've decided to run tons and tons of<n>big races.
And at the end of that grind<n>sesh, I'm gonna take
on Opera O and<n>Doto!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Next Episode—Digitan's Training<n>Montage! I'm
gonna travel the<n>country picking up new skills
wherever I go!
